sentences.target: Ich blättere im Magazin beim Frühstück.

translations.de: Ich blättere im Magazin beim Frühstück.
translations.en: I flip through the magazine at breakfast.
translations.es: Hojeo la revista durante el desayuno.
translations.fr: Je feuillette le magazine au petit-déjeuner.
translations.zh-Hans: 我吃早饭时随手翻翻杂志。
translations.yue: 我食早餐嗰陣隨手翻下雜誌。
translations.pt: Folheio a revista no café da manhã.
translations.vi: Tôi lật xem tạp chí lúc ăn sáng.
translations.nl: Tijdens het ontbijt blader ik door het tijdschrift.
translations.uk: Я переглядаю журнал під час сніданку.
translations.hi: नाश्ते के समय मैं पत्रिका पलटता हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg bladrer i bladet under frokosten.
translations.sv: Jag bläddrar i magasinet vid frukosten.
translations.da: Jeg bladrer i magasinet under morgenmaden.
translations.ja: 朝ごはんを食べながら雑誌をぱらぱらめくります。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the finite verb
finite main verb, 1st person singular present indicative; describes the action
contraction of the preposition 'in' + definite article 'dem'; governs dative; introduces a locative PP
neuter noun, singular dative as object of the preposition 'im'; head of the PP
contraction of 'bei' + 'dem'; governs dative; introduces a temporal/locative PP
neuter noun, singular dative as object of 'beim'; temporal setting ('during breakfast')

sentences.target: Lisa kauft ein Magazin am Bahnhof.

translations.de: Lisa kauft ein Magazin am Bahnhof.
translations.en: Lisa buys a magazine at the station.
translations.es: Lisa compra una revista en la estación.
translations.fr: Lisa achète un magazine à la gare.
translations.it: Lisa compra una rivista alla stazione.
translations.zh-Hans: 丽莎在车站买了一本杂志。
translations.pt: Lisa compra uma revista na estação.
translations.vi: Lisa mua một tạp chí ở nhà ga.
translations.nl: Lisa koopt een tijdschrift op het station.
translations.hu: Lisa vesz egy magazint az állomáson.
translations.hi: लीसा स्टेशन पर एक पत्रिका खरीदती है.
translations.el: Η Λίζα αγοράζει ένα περιοδικό στον σταθμό.
translations.nb: Lisa kjøper et magasin på stasjonen.
translations.sv: Lisa köper en tidskrift på stationen.
translations.ro: Lisa cumpără o revistă la gară.
translations.da: Lisa køber et magasin på stationen.
translations.ja: リサは駅で雑誌を買います。

tokens.explanation: proper noun, nominative singular; subject of the clause
finite main verb, 3rd person singular present indicative; takes a direct object
indefinite article, accusative singular neuter; determiner agreeing with 'Magazin'
neuter noun, singular accusative; direct object of 'kauft'
contraction of 'an' + 'dem'; governs dative; introduces a locative PP
masculine noun, singular dative as object of 'am'; location

sentences.target: In diesem Magazin ist ein Rezept für Nudeln.
sentences.reading: /ɪn ˈdiːzəm maɡaˈtsiːn ɪst aɪ̯n ʁeˈtsɛpt fyːɐ̯ ˈnuːdl̩n/

translations.de: In diesem Magazin ist ein Rezept für Nudeln.
translations.ipa: /ɪn ˈdiːzəm maɡaˈtsiːn ɪst aɪ̯n ʁeˈtsɛpt fyːɐ̯ ˈnuːdl̩n/
translations.en: In this magazine there is a recipe for pasta.
translations.es: En esta revista hay una receta de pasta.
translations.fr: Dans ce magazine, il y a une recette de pâtes.
translations.it: In questa rivista c'è una ricetta di pasta.
translations.zh-Hans: 这本杂志里有一份意大利面食谱。
translations.yue: 呢本雜誌入面有一個意粉食譜。
translations.ru: В этом журнале есть рецепт пасты.
translations.pt: Nesta revista há uma receita de macarrão.
translations.vi: Trong tạp chí này có một công thức mì Ý.
translations.nl: In dit tijdschrift staat een recept voor pasta.
translations.uk: У цьому журналі є рецепт пасти.
translations.hu: Ebben a magazinban van egy tésztarecept.
translations.hi: इस पत्रिका में पास्ता की एक रेसिपी है.
translations.pl: W tym czasopiśmie jest przepis na makaron.
translations.el: Σε αυτό το περιοδικό υπάρχει μια συνταγή για ζυμαρικά.
translations.nb: I dette magasinet er det en oppskrift på pasta.
translations.id: Di majalah ini ada resep pasta.
translations.sv: I det här magasinet finns ett recept på pasta.
translations.ro: În această revistă este o rețetă de paste.
translations.cs: V tomto časopise je recept na těstoviny.
translations.da: I dette magasin er der en opskrift på pasta.
translations.ja: この雑誌にはパスタのレシピが載っています。

tokens.explanation: preposition governing dative here (static location); introduces a fronted PP
demonstrative/article in dative singular neuter; modifies 'Magazin'
neuter noun, singular dative; object of 'in'; head of the fronted PP (locative frame)
finite auxiliary (copula), 3rd person singular present; links subject and predicate nominal
indefinite article, nominative singular neuter; determiner of the predicate nominal
neuter noun, singular nominative; predicate nominal (predicative complement) with 'ist'
preposition governing accusative; introduces a PP expressing purpose/target
plural noun, accusative; object of the preposition 'für'

sentences.target: Das Magazin liegt auf dem Couchtisch.

translations.de: Das Magazin liegt auf dem Couchtisch.
translations.en: The magazine is lying on the coffee table.
translations.es: La revista está sobre la mesa de centro.
translations.fr: Le magazine est sur la table basse.
translations.ko: 잡지가 커피 테이블 위에 놓여 있어요.
translations.pt: A revista está na mesa de centro.
translations.vi: Tạp chí nằm trên bàn cà phê.
translations.nl: Het tijdschrift ligt op de salontafel.
translations.hi: पत्रिका कॉफी टेबल पर रखी है.
translations.el: Το περιοδικό είναι πάνω στο τραπεζάκι του σαλονιού.
translations.id: Majalah itu tergeletak di meja kopi.
translations.ro: Revista este pe măsuța de cafea.
translations.ja: 雑誌はローテーブルの上に置いてあります。

tokens.explanation: definite article, nominative singular neuter; determiner of the subject noun

preposition; with static location it governs dative; introduces a locative PP
definite article, dative singular masculine; determiner of 'Couchtisch'
masculine noun, singular dative; object of the preposition 'auf' (location)
